rejection_reasons.pressure_only_without_retention: Does not yet reduce the practical operating-state gap.
rejection_reasons.onset_only_without_enough_headroom: Scientifically interesting but not enough for top route priority.
rejection_reasons.theory_only_near_ambient_conventional_op: Current ceiling and evidence do not beat the unconventional frontier.
rejection_reasons.hydride_routes_already_closed_negatively: Previous milestones already screened them under stricter practical criteria.
